Functions: In Charge for Public Transport Routes & Services, and Intelligent Transport System (ITS).

No. of route and service inspections conducted

No. of trainings/seminars attended

Functions: Takes charge of the QGIS and Google Earth Pro mapping of the existing Motorized Tricycle for Hire and Motorized Taxi (Habal Habal) routes as well as its proposed amendments, and of the various transport data gathered by the Office.

Functions: Assists the TMS Head in any matter related to ITS, including but not limited to public routes overlaying and conflicting routes identification with the upcoming Davao City Bus project.
